mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER WHERE STATUS = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRAVEL_LIST WHERE STATUS = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SCHEDULE_MAIN WHERE SCHEDULE_STATUS = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM QLIST WHERE STATUS = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPLY WHERE STATUS = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPORT WHERE REPORT_STATUS = 'N'
SELECT ID, nickname, email, phone, ENROLL_DATE, status FROM MEMBER where id != #{id}
SELECT N.NOTICE_NO, N.TITLE, M.ID AS MEMBER_NAME, N.CREATE_DATE, N.MODIFY_DATE FROM NOTICE N JOIN MEMBER M ON N.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO ORDER BY N.NOTICE_NO DESC

SELECT S.SCHEDULE_NO AS postNo, '공유' AS boardType, S.SCHEDULE_TITLE AS title, M.NICKNAME AS nickname, S.CREATE_DATE AS createDate, S.SCHEDULE_STATUS AS status FROM SCHEDULE_MAIN S JOIN MEMBER M ON S.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO WHERE S.SCHEDULE_VISIBILITY IN ('Y', 'M')

SELECT T.TRAVEL_NO AS postNo, '후기' AS boardType, T.TRAVEL_TITLE AS title, M.NICKNAME AS nickname, T.CREATE_DATE AS createDate, T.STATUS AS status FROM TRAVEL_LIST T JOIN MEMBER M ON T.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO
SELECT Q.Q_NO AS postNo, '질문' AS boardType, Q.TITLE AS title, M.NICKNAME AS nickname, Q.CREATE_DATE AS createDate, Q.STATUS AS status FROM QLIST Q JOIN MEMBER M ON Q.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO
